_comment: Ground truth from Factorio 2.1.12 (Space Age enabled) via the test/oracle harness. vulcanus_starting_area_radius (constant 0.7 * 0.75 = 0.525) and vulcanus_ore_spacing (constant 128), plus vulcanus_temperature at 4 points, all sampled against a real Vulcanus surface (game.planets['vulcanus'].create_surface()). Proves the Space-Age oracle routing (spaceAge/planet options) end to end. Regenerate: node --experimental-strip-types test/oracle/capture.ts vulcanus-smoke
